context.goal: Extract the currently selected inline image using the toolbar extract command.
context.cues: An inline image on the PDF page is already selected with a border; toolbar contains image manipulation buttons including Extract (imageOnly).

state_anchor.locator: selection border around the embedded image

procedure.expect: The extract command is invoked; the button appears pressed/highlighted, then a Windows error/reporting dialog appears saying 'pdfedit.exe has stopped working'.
